mapper.sql:
select ci.wechat_id , ci.address , ci.customer_info_id , cte.tag_name , ci.source , rle.level_name , ci.phone , ci.wechat_data_encrypted , cte.is_ai_generated , ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_name , ci.email
FROM customer_info ci left join rfm_level_enum rle on ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 = rle.rfm_level_enum_id left join customer_tag_enum cte on ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 = cte.customer_tag_enum_id
mapper.select:
select ci.wechat_id , ci.address , ci.customer_info_id , cte.tag_name , ci.source , rle.level_name , ci.phone , ci.wechat_data_encrypted , cte.is_ai_generated , ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 , ci.customer_name , ci.email
FROM customer_info ci left join
rfm_level_enum
rle on ci.rfm_level_enum_rfm_level_enum_id_1 = rle.rfm_level_enum_id left join
customer_tag_enum
cte on ci.customer_tag_enum_customer_tag_enum_id_1 = cte.customer_tag_enum_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
